chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR _.P No.D-1134 0f 2023 Date ٧ ٥٢٥٤٢n ٥٥ 9 ٤٧٤ق9٥كg٤ For haarlng o/ CMA No.4728/2023 ol maln اد 150&2023 Mr Adil Khan Rid, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr Saeed Ahmed Wassan along with ASI Ejaz Ahmed of PS Shah Lateef Town Malir Karachi 4474444 741 Respondents No2 3 & 5 have filed their statements along with certain documents which are taken on record Mr Tariq Hussain Rajpar, aovocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent N0.6 with educationa testimonials of Petitioner No and submits that petitioner is about 17 years of age IO/ASI Ejaz Ahmed of PS Shah Lateef upon the directions of this Court has recorded statement of Petitioner No.1 taken record wherein she has categorically stated that she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No 2 with her own accord She further states that neither she has been abducted nor enticed away by anyone however her mother has lodged false FIR against her husband and in laws, which is nothing but bundles of lies Learned AAG in view of statement of Petitioner submits that instant petition may be disposed of in the light of statement of Petitioner No.1 Accordingly Investigation Officer is directed submit report ٧٨٥٤٢ Section 173 Cr.P.C before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the case in Iine with the statement of petitioner No.1 and submit compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court Instant petition stands disposed with listed applicationts) huaring AAG along N٥.٦, along حداما 3 ا١ learned Counsel for the Petitioner He has however controverted of learned Counsel for the petitioner After hearing the parties and perusing the material available record this petition is disposed of with consent in the terms whereby for two months no adverse action would be taken against tne petitioner in terms of impugned notice In the said two months, petitioner take serious efforts to get its appeal decided and Respondent No 2 ie Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki would decide the same without adjourning ٥٨٧ exCUse Nevertheless ١٢ the appeal is not decided on any of the grounds within the same period then continuation of this arrangement would be subject to payment entire liability amount by the petitioner with the Deputy Commissioner the authority In any case the appeal shall be decided within period of six months and report be submitted in compliance Petition is disposed
